description: Value & preference filter applies the active profile's value framework (definitions.md §4), not just hard filters + fundamentals. With prefers_handmade_local + markup_tolerance=low, a handmade/local alternative with slightly lower raw fundamentals must out-rank a higher-fundamentals mass-market item carrying unjustified markup. A fundamentals-only ranking (neutral profile) picks the opposite — proving the framework, not raw score, decides. Logic fixture — consumed by tools/test-logic.mjs.
